meta.description: TASK D (D1): Human-translated English versions of the 5 evaluable Korean queries from external_consultation_queries_validated.json. No external API used; translations are manual to avoid sending technical descriptions to external services (consistent with the information-minimization theme).
meta.caveat: Korean evaluable sample is only 5; results are trends, not statistically robust. Sample expansion needed.

translations.ext-002: We plan to supply plasma generation equipment for semiconductor etching processes to a Vietnamese company. We need to know the export control classification of this equipment.
translations.ext-004: We plan to provide a high-precision gyroscope module for drones as a sample to an overseas university. We need to verify potential military applications.
translations.ext-006: We want to export titanium alloy plates for aircraft to a German aerospace parts company. We heard the high material grade may make it a controlled item.
translations.ext-016: We supply special metal powder for 3D printers to France. It may be usable for manufacturing military components.
translations.ext-028: We want to export torpedo guidance control components (sonar and acoustic signal processing) to a NATO member country. It is for military use.
